Nwankwo Christian Nwosu Kanu, OON (ojoibi Ojo kinni Osukejo odun 1976 ni Owerri, Nigeria), tabi Kanu lasan, je alagbata agbaboolu-elese omo ile Naijiria to tun gba iwaju fun egbe alagbata ni Football League Championship, Portsmouth. O tun pile ti je omo egbe agbaboolu omoorile-ede Naijiria fun odun merindinlogun lati 1994 titi di 2010. Kanu wa lati egbe eya eniyan Igbo;[1] oruko re, Nwankwo, tumosi Odo mokunrin ti abi ni ojo oja Nkwo ni ede Igbo.[2]. Kanu gba eso UEFA Champions League kan, eso Ife-eye UEFA kan, Eso Abori Ife-eye FA meta ati ebun Ara Afrika Agbaboolu-Elese Ododun meji. O tun je ikan ninu awon agbaboolu ti won ti gba Premier League, Ife-eye FA, Champions League, Ife-eye UEFA ati Eso Wura Olympiki.[3] Bakanna o tun je alabasoju UNICEF.[4]. https://yo.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nwankwo_Kanu
